hero.eyebrow: Senior Graphic Designer · Amazon Brand Specialist
hero.bio: I build scroll-stopping visual content for Amazon storefronts, A+ modules, and brand identities — turning browsers into buyers through design that drives engagement and revenue.

about.label: About
about.statement: A graphic designer obsessed with visual content that drives engagement and revenue across the Amazon ecosystem.
about.body: I'm Jay — a senior graphic designer focused on building brand experiences that perform. From storefront architecture to scroll-stopping A+ modules, I bridge aesthetics and conversion to help brands stand out in a crowded marketplace.

categories.title: Storefronts
categories.desc: Full Amazon brand stores — architecture, hero design and shoppable navigation.

categories.title: A+ Content
categories.desc: Premium detail-page modules and brand stories that elevate the listing and convert.

categories.title: Infographics
categories.desc: Benefit, how-to and comparison visuals that make a product instantly understood.

items.title: Amazon Brand Stores
items.desc: End-to-end storefront design — layout architecture, hero banners, and shoppable navigation built to convert.

items.title: A+ & Premium Content
items.desc: Modular A+ content and brand story pages that communicate value and elevate the product detail page.

items.title: Brand Identity
items.desc: Visual systems, logos, and guidelines that give brands a cohesive, premium presence across every touchpoint.

items.title: Product Mockups
items.desc: Photorealistic mockups and lifestyle compositions that make products feel tangible and desirable.

footer.tagline: Senior Graphic Designer · Amazon Brand Specialist
